data.title: Sterling Metals Sells Sail Pond Project to Refocus on Core Copper Assets
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sterling Metals ( (TSE:SAG) ) just unveiled an update.

Sterling Metals Corp. has agreed to sell a 100% interest in its Sail Pond project to an arm’s length purchaser in exchange for 96,078 common shares of the buyer, shifting value from the asset into an equity stake. Completion of the transaction is contingent on regulatory approvals, including from the TSX Venture Exchange, and the shares issued will be subject to a four-month-plus-one-day statutory hold period under applicable securities laws.

The sale effectively streamlines Sterling’s portfolio around its core Canadian copper-focused assets, the Soo Copper and Adeline projects, which have shown potential for significant new copper discoveries. By converting the Sail Pond property into purchaser equity while concentrating on large-scale copper opportunities, Sterling aims to sharpen its strategic focus and potentially enhance its positioning within the Canadian mineral exploration sector.

Spark’s Take on SAG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SAG is a Neutral.

Score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and ongoing cash burn). Support comes from strong price trend/momentum and positive project/financing events that extend runway, but valuation remains constrained by loss-making results and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on SAG stock, click here.

More about Sterling Metals

Sterling Metals Corp. is a Toronto-based mineral exploration company focused on large-scale, high-grade Canadian projects. It is advancing the 25,000-hectare Soo Copper Project in Ontario, which hosts past production and multiple breccia and porphyry targets near established infrastructure, and the 29,000-hectare Adeline Project in Labrador, covering a sediment-hosted copper belt with significant silver credits.

The company positions itself as a pioneer in exploring mineral-rich regions of Canada and emphasizes responsible engagement with Indigenous communities. At its Soo Copper project, Sterling conducts exploration on the traditional lands of the First Nations of the North Shore of Lake Superior and has committed to respectful, transparent and inclusive relationships with Indigenous Peoples.

Average Trading Volume: 107,218

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$64.74M

Find detailed analytics on SAG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

CES Energy Solutions ( (TSE:CEU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

CES Energy Solutions Corp. will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after markets close on May 7, 2026, and hold a conference call the following morning, May 8, at 9:00 a.m. MT, led by President and CEO Ken Zinger. The call, accessible by webcast and telephone with a replay available for 90 days, underscores the company’s ongoing commitment to transparent communication with investors as it seeks to capitalize on growing demand for drilling fluids and production chemicals in North America.

By facilitating broad access to its quarterly update, CES is aiming to keep stakeholders closely informed about its financial performance and strategic progress in the competitive oilfield chemistry market. The move aligns with its asset-light, cash-generative business model, which positions the company to respond efficiently to shifts in oilfield activity and demand across drilling, completion, production, and midstream segments.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CEU) stock is a Buy with a C$23.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CES Energy Solutions stock, see the TSE:CEU Stock Forecast page.

CEA Industries ( (BNC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 13, 2026, CEA Industries announced that its stapled warrants to purchase common stock at an exercise price of $15.15 per share have been approved for listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. Trading in the warrants, which will carry the ticker symbol BNCWZ, is scheduled to begin on April 15, 2026, marking a new avenue for investors to gain leveraged exposure to the company’s equity.

The stapled warrants, originally issued under a 2025 securities purchase agreement and governed by an August 5, 2025 warrant agreement, total 49,504,988 outstanding units. Each warrant entitles the holder to buy one share of common stock until August 5, 2028, a move that could influence the company’s capital structure over time and offers existing and prospective stakeholders an additional instrument for participating in its growth strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (BNC) stock is a Buy with a $29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CEA Industries stock, see the BNC Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BNC is a Neutral.

Corporate events are mixed, adding governance improvements alongside elevated control/strategy uncertainty, while valuation provides limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on BNC stock, click here.

data.description:

Collective Mining ( (TSE:CNL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Collective Mining has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission dated April 13, 2026, to notify investors of key dates for its upcoming annual and special meeting of security holders. The filing confirms that TSX Trust Company has sent a Notice of Record and Meeting Dates to the Canadian Depository for Securities, formalizing the process for shareholder participation.

The annual and special meeting is scheduled for June 15, 2026, with May 8, 2026 set as the record date for notice, voting, and beneficial ownership determination, and only holders of common shares will be entitled to receive notice and vote. Collective Mining will not use notice-and-access for proxy materials, and has opted to send materials directly to non-objecting beneficial owners while also paying for the delivery of materials to objecting beneficial owners, signaling an effort to ensure broad shareholder engagement in upcoming corporate decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CNL) stock is a Buy with a C$29.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Collective Mining stock, see the TSE:CNL Stock Forecast page.

Technicals add support due to a strong uptrend and positive momentum, while valuation remains a drag because earnings are negative and there is no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on CNL stock, click here.

Green Cross Health ( (NZ:GXH) ) has issued an announcement.

Green Cross Health, a major New Zealand primary healthcare operator across pharmacies and medical centres, has confirmed it is in discussions with third parties about a potential transaction involving its Medical division. The company, which runs the Unichem, Life Pharmacy and The Doctors brands, continues to focus on accessible and sustainable healthcare nationwide.

The board’s acknowledgment follows an Australian media report suggesting a possible sale of the Medical division, though the company stresses there is no certainty any deal will proceed. Any transaction could materially reshape Green Cross Health’s portfolio and strategic focus, and the company has pledged to keep shareholders informed under its continuous disclosure obligations.

More about Green Cross Health

Green Cross Health is a New Zealand primary healthcare provider operating multidisciplinary teams to deliver sustainable healthcare solutions and positive patient experiences. Through its Unichem, Life Pharmacy and The Doctors brands, it runs more than 300 pharmacies across almost all New Zealand communities and 65 medical centres serving over 400,000 enrolled patients.

data.title: Veea Transfers to Nasdaq Capital Market Amid Compliance Efforts
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Veea ( (VEEA) ) has provided an announcement.

On September 29, 2025, Veea Inc. received multiple Nasdaq deficiency notices after its common stock traded below $1 for 30 consecutive business days and its market value metrics fell short of Global Market thresholds, triggering initial 180‑day cure periods ending March 30, 2026. After failing to regain compliance, the company applied on March 27, 2026 to transfer its listing to the Nasdaq Capital Market, securing a second 180‑day window to meet the minimum bid price requirement.

Nasdaq approved the transfer on April 7, 2026, and trading moved from the Nasdaq Global Market to the Nasdaq Capital Market on April 9, 2026, with VEEA and VEEAW continuing to trade without interruption. As part of this move, Veea was granted until September 28, 2026 to restore its share price to at least $1 for 10 consecutive business days and indicated it may use measures such as a reverse stock split to regain full compliance, seeking to preserve its Nasdaq listing and investor access to liquidity.

More about Veea

Veea Inc., a Delaware corporation listed on Nasdaq under the symbols VEEA and VEEAW, operates as a publicly traded company subject to Nasdaq’s Global Market and Capital Market listing standards. The firm’s shares and public warrants are actively traded and must meet minimum bid price, market value and corporate governance requirements to maintain exchange listing.

Average Trading Volume: 1,527,100

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $29.48M

For a thorough assessment of VEEA stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

National Healthcare Properties ( (HLTC) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 10, 2026, National Healthcare Properties authorized up to 100,000,000 shares of Class A common stock in connection with a proposed public offering, with each Class A share set to automatically convert into one common share 180 days after the offering’s pricing, if completed. The move positions the company to tap equity markets while preserving identical economic rights between its existing common stock and the new Class A shares, potentially providing additional capital flexibility.

For the quarter ended March 31, 2026, preliminary same-store results indicated that the senior housing operating properties segment saw average occupancy of about 83.8%, higher than a year earlier, alongside RevPOR between $6,275 and $6,325 and an improved cash NOI margin of 21.0% to 22.0%. The outpatient medical facility portfolio maintained robust ending occupancy of roughly 94.0%, underscoring stable demand across the company’s medical real estate assets even as the reported figures remain subject to final audit and adjustment.

data.title: Mount Logan Capital Assumes Parent Guarantor Role on Credit Facility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Mount Logan Capital Inc ( (MLCI) ) is now available.

On April 7, 2026, Mount Logan Capital Inc. entered into a Third Amended and Restated Guaranty, under which it assumed from its wholly owned subsidiary the role of guarantor for obligations under a 2021 Credit Agreement with MLC US Holdings LLC as borrower. The company now absolutely and unconditionally guarantees the borrower’s payment obligations, including principal, interest, premiums, fees, costs and expenses, and is required to maintain a net worth of at least $40 million while refraining from incurring or guaranteeing additional debt beyond defined permitted categories, tightening its balance-sheet discipline and clarifying creditor protections.

These guaranty terms consolidate credit support at the parent-company level, potentially strengthening lender confidence in Mount Logan Capital’s creditworthiness and its commitment to the existing facility. The restrictions on additional indebtedness, coupled with the minimum net-worth covenant, may limit the firm’s financing flexibility but provide greater transparency and security to stakeholders relying on the stability of the company’s capital structure.

Spark’s Take on MLCI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MLCI is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak recent financial performance (sharp TTM revenue contraction, losses, and negative operating/free cash flow) and a bearish technical setup (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting factors include a very high dividend yield, constructive long-term growth guidance from the latest call, and generally positive growth-oriented corporate actions, tempered by new debt costs and the misconduct-related overhang.

To see Spark’s full report on MLCI stock, click here.

More about Mount Logan Capital Inc

Mount Logan Capital Inc. is a financial services company that operates through subsidiaries providing credit-related investment and financing solutions. The firm focuses on structured credit arrangements and lending activities, utilizing credit facilities and guaranty structures to support its U.S.-based borrowing entities and related investment operations.

Average Trading Volume: 86,274

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.83M
